Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Initial integration failed because frontend target URL/port did not match active backend service.
Notes about Resolution: Standardized API base configuration and validated requests against running backend endpoints.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Axios + Vite env config. AI tools: setup/debug checklist generation.

Bug or Obstacle: JWT token not consistently attached to protected requests
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Login succeeded but protected routes/API calls intermittently failed authorization in early wiring.
Notes about Resolution: Centralized auth-header utility and routed protected calls through shared API client methods.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: DRF SimpleJWT + React route guards. AI tools: auth flow tracing and fix validation prompts.

Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Cross-origin requests were rejected for one local origin variant during frontend-backend integration.
Notes about Resolution: Corrected allowed origins configuration and re-tested end-to-end login plus programs flow.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Django CORS settings. AI tools: CORS troubleshooting checklist.

Bug or Obstacle: Coach form payload did not match backend program serializer
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: UI initially used local-only weekly structure while backend required normalized TrainingProgram fields.
Notes about Resolution: Refactored submit payload to backend contract and added assignment-compatible fields.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: DRF serializers + React form state mapping. AI tools: payload contract alignment support.

Bug or Obstacle: Athlete logbook data was not persistently queryable
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Workout entries were local-state/localStorage oriented, limiting history retrieval and multi-session continuity.
Notes about Resolution: Implemented backend workout-log and PR create/list APIs and wired dashboard history views to API data.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Django models/serializers/views + React async fetch flows. AI tools: refactor sequencing and regression checklist.

Bug or Obstacle: Test smoke flow failed with DisallowedHost and scope-pressure risk before MVP lock
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Automated test-client run hit host validation issue; parallel risk identified that stretch features could reduce MVP completion reliability.
Notes about Resolution: Resolved test context host handling, re-ran smoke suite successfully, and enforced MVP-first scope gate for sprint execution.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Django ALLOWED_HOSTS test behavior + sprint control practices. AI tools: error interpretation, mitigation options, and priority matrix.

Bug or Obstacle: Local self-host script startup failed when dependencies/env were incomplete
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: First run of local host scripts failed on machines missing one-time setup steps, which blocked quick demo startup.
Notes about Resolution: Updated setup/run docs and script expectations, then validated the local host path end to end (frontend preview plus backend runtime).
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: bash scripts, Gunicorn, Vite preview, env alignment. AI tools: script troubleshooting checklist.

Bug or Obstacle: Presentation flowcharts rendered Mermaid syntax error
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Initial diagram labels and class naming patterns triggered parser errors in Mermaid 10.9.x, so some charts showed syntax error cards.
Notes about Resolution: Hardened all chart syntax with safer labels and class names, then revalidated each chart render in browser.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Mermaid flowchart syntax constraints and HTML report integration. AI tools: syntax debugging and iterative patching.

Bug or Obstacle: Header logo did not appear in first presentation pass
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Logo file path was not correctly wired at first, causing a missing image in the branded header.
Notes about Resolution: Inserted direct relative path to Westminster logo asset and confirmed header branding renders in the report.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: static asset pathing in local HTML context. AI tools: path validation support.

Bug or Obstacle: Workflow diagrams appeared off-center in report cards
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Several Mermaid diagrams rendered left-biased inside containers, which looked inconsistent in presentation mode.
Notes about Resolution: Applied global Mermaid SVG centering and removed redundant per-chart alignment hacks.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: CSS centering for rendered Mermaid SVG elements. AI tools: targeted style-fix suggestions.

Bug or Obstacle: TOC links were incomplete after section expansion
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: New sections were added quickly and not all were reachable from quick navigation, slowing live walkthroughs.
Notes about Resolution: Added missing anchor IDs and expanded TOC entries to cover all major sections including Part II.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: in-page anchor mapping and navigation consistency pass. AI tools: section map generation and link integrity checks.

Bug or Obstacle: Backend API flows required a post-debug regression confidence check
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: After multiple backend/API debug iterations, there was risk that auth/program/athlete endpoints had hidden regressions before demos.
Notes about Resolution: Ran ./bin/zw uat and confirmed full flow pass (19/19 checks): register/login, /auth/me, coach programs create/update, athlete completion, workout logs, PRs, and Sinclair endpoint.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: Django REST endpoints + scripted UAT harness (frontend preview + backend API checks). AI tools: Codex-assisted validation checklist and transcript review.

Bug or Obstacle: Backend API hardening gaps were not yet captured in the bug/fix tracker
Notes about Bug / Obstacle: Post-debug review surfaced production hardening risks (token handling exposure, missing auth throttling, and no refresh retry path) that were known but not formally logged.
Notes about Resolution: Documented the risk set and converted it into prioritized improvement actions for next implementation pass so fixes can be tracked explicitly.
Notes about technology, including AI too: Tech: auth/session architecture + DRF security controls. AI tools: Codex codebase risk review synthesis.
